stroke_style: thick dry-erase marker with organic wobble
topological_morph_notes: We reach the very end of the perspective tunnel. The final abstract cosmos lens morphs and solidifies into the singular glowing node representing the final hidden state for Board 5.
qualia_alignment: Isolated SVG paths successfully split into After Skool compositional layers.
